text.message: my setup too good again jay?
jay has a grudge from last game thats all
that solo on the 5 wheat was pure spite
No it was slowing you down. If these guys had a clue it would be on your wheat the whole game so this didn’t happen
nah these guys bounce it between 8 wheat and 8 ore which is reasonable
your 5 block back when it was anyones game
sure im not saying i have a bad setup
im saying i dont feel bad for you in the least after going after me like that
It’s a game. Don’t want anyone to feel bad about anything lol
then block the tile that is optimal to block
That was the tile if anyone has any foresight
black appreciates your misguided foresight im sure
You’re the one who has the robs n knights. Kept attacking me lol that’s on you
